content_body:
My husband and I really want to thank you so much for such a wonderful vacation. This vacation was so relaxing and peaceful, exactly what we needed!! This vacation was lovely for all 5 of our senses:
1. Sight - hawk, turkey and 5 babies, deer, breathtaking views
2. Sound - wind blowing, rain pounding, leaves crunching, bees buzzing
3. Smell: camp fire, grilled chicken
4. Taste: s'mores at fire pit, great grilled good, fudge, birthday cake
5. Touch: new shirt, train rail, canoe ore, splashing water, heated hot tub
So, as you can see this was everything we needed and more! We loved the seclusion and amazing views. They were the best. Thank you!
IN
title: All Five Senses Heightened in North Georgia
